title: Courier to Lowmark
target: ride the sealed dispatch to the Lowmark guildhouse and return with the countersigned writ — a four-day round trip through the salt-roads

contributions.line: [mock] Dren (Male) takes on "carry the satchel, set the pace, do not lose the seal".
[mock] Imogen (Female) takes on "second on the road — talk past tolls, watch the rider's back".

outcomeNarrative: [mock] A bruised partial; ride the sealed dispatch to the Lowmark guildhouse and return with the countersigned writ — a four-day round trip through the salt-roads slips half-grasped, but no one is broken.
